scenes.text: In this lecture, we will explore Docker, a platform designed to help developers build, deploy, and run applications in containers. Docker ensures that applications are isolated and are consistent across various environments, from development to production. We will cover the core components of Docker, such as images and containers, how they interact, and the benefits of utilizing Docker in software development processes.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A[Docker] --> B[Images]; A --> C[Containers]; B --> D[Builds environment]; C --> E[Runs application]; D --> F[Consistent environment]; E --> G[Isolated application]; F --> H[Dev & Prod alignment]; G --> H;
